items.title: Anker’s new 13-in-1 Nano docking station with built-in removable hub returns to its lowest price for Big Spring sale
items.summary:
As part of the ongoing Big Spring Sale event, Anker’s official Amazon storefront is offering its latest 13-in-1 Nano docking station for $109.99 shipped. This model debuted earlier this year at CES as one of the newest additions to the brand’s Nano lineup and typically carries a $150 price tag. It briefly dipped to $110 for Prime members shortly after launch, and today’s 27% discount brings it right back to that – matching the lowest price we’ve tracked so far. It’s a versatile model that works equally well as a full desktop dock at home or a compact hub for travel, and you can find more details below.

Segway Navimow has expanded its ongoing Spring Sale on robot lawn mowers, which coincides with the Amazon Big Spring Sale, but is running longer into April. The newest models that only recently launched are being added in now, like Segway’s Navimow X430 Robotic Lawn Mower down at $2,299 shipped, which matches the price over at Amazon, though you can score an additional $50 savings on the brand’s direct site by playing the simulator game at the bottom of the sale’s landing page. Down from its $2,499 full price, we saw this model launch at $2,249 in February, which you can score by playing the simulator, otherwise you’re getting the next-best price, courtesy of the $200 initial discount. Head below to learn more about this robot, which I’ve just started using to help my parents manage their lawn in their old age (and am quite impressed by so far), as well as browse the full lineup of offers while they last.

Things have been keeping steady around $799 in 2026, with occasional falls to $749, like today’s deal that repeats the $450 markdown off the going rate ($750 off the MSRP) for the second-lowest price we have tracked, just $50 above the low last spotted during Black Friday and Cyber Monday sales. items.title: Lenovo’s budget-friendly Android Idea Tab with stylus and folio case is down to $180, more from $90
items.summary:
As part of the ongoing Big Spring Sale, Amazon is now offering Lenovo’s Idea Tab Android tablet bundled with both the stylus and folio case for $179.99 shipped. This budget-friendly model typically goes for $250, so you’re looking at a $70 discount here, which makes it even easier on your wallet. We’ve seen the 4GB RAM and 128GB storage variant go on sale plenty of times in the past – including a current $150 deal at Best Buy – but discounts on this higher-spec model have been far less common. Today’s offer brings this configuration to within $10 of its all-time low, making it a particularly solid value when you factor in that it includes both the stylus and the folio case right in the box. And the fact that it’s only $30 more than the base variant makes it a pretty good option to consider.

items.title: DJI’s Avata 360 is a more functional, flexible 360 drone
